creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Regarding the moosefs-client port I have changed yourt patch to properly 
handle the configuration file, as suggested in the porter's handbook, 
and the same way the other moosefs ports are doing. I'm attaching a 
patch for you to review and approve.

Thanks!

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
